ftbquests.chapter.create.quest1447952569: &eAndesite Casing&r can be made by interacting with a stripped log while holding an &eAndesite Alloy&r.
&eMechanical Belts&r are great for transporting items along conveyors in your &dFactory&r. To place a &eMechanical Belt&r, you attach each end to a &eShaft&r.
&eTip:&r &eMechanical Belts&r can be used to transfer rotational power horizontally to two &eShafts&r.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest1679673783: This armor is worthless on its own, but it holds &lan ancient power&r when worn as a set.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest1907836811: Sending &dRotational Power&r into the &eJetpack&r will refuel it allowing for flight!
&eTip:&r Can be enchanted with &dCapacity&r to extend Tank Capacity.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest2133148273: Cogs can double and halve speed when a &eLarge Cog&r is placed next to a &eSmall Cog&r.
Placing a &eLarge Cog&r connected to a &eSmall Cogs&r shaft allows a chain of cogs increasing speeds.
The Best Way to Increase Speed
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest2147178214: &oHave you ever had a tough to reach block and thought "Huh if only I could extend my reach"? Well now you can with the Extendo Grip 9000 all tough to reach mobs and blocks suddenly feel much closer! &r
&oOur sleek patent design allows extended use when paired with the &lnew&r &oBacktank Pro. No longer will you worry about running out of durability again!&r
&oWe are not responsible for any damages or injuries caused by the Extendo Grip. Backtank not included&r.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest2336751881: &3Create&f is a tech mod unlike many others. It allows for custom &dContraptions&f and &dFactories&f to produce and transport goods.
&eZinc&f is an essential ore found underground in the &2Overworld&f and is used for almost every item in the pack.
&eTip:&f If you are unsure of how an item works in Create, &6holding W to ponder&f will provide you a visual.
Step into the World of Cogs and Contraptions!
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest2476064738: Interacting with a &6Blaze&r or &6Blaze Spawner&r with an empty &eBlaze Burner&r will capture the &6Blaze&r allowing advanced mixing.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest2567185561: Pressing &ePulp&f with a &eMechanical Press&f turns it into &eCardboard.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest2692908098: &6Hint:&f The courtyard has a secret loot room try to find the button!
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest2836673426: &6Crushing Wheels&r will crush &eores&r and entities stuck between them!
&eTip:&r &6Crushing Wheels&r must be &drotating&r in opposite directions, &eGearboxes&r will reverse &drotational directions&r!
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest2902354644: The &eSpout&r is used to apply liquids to items with recipes that require a liquid.
Tip: Use a &eDepot&r to hold the items under the &eSpout&r.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest3305912684: An &eItem Drain&r empties buckets of liquid into your fluid system.
&eFluid Tanks&r store large amounts of a single liquid.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest3675799904: The Stress FE Generator is capable of converting Create Stress Units to FE (Forge Energy)
FE storage blocks can be fueled with energy and FE powered items can be charged by being placed in a depot connected to the generator!
&eTip:&r Converting Stress to FE can be a useful way to generate Forge Energy in the early game! It's basically free energy!
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest3873469145: Mixing &eDough&r and &eLime Dye&r creates &aSlimeballs&r which almost every contraption needs!
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest3950657772: The &eMechanical Saw&f can be used to cut down an entire tree in a single chop.
When facing upwards, passing Logs through a &eMechanical Saw&r will cut Items, for Logs, first Stripping them, and then cutting them into more Planks than usual!
Great way of Collecting Mass Amounts of &6Wood
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest4134621496: &oHello, this is your pilot speaking. Thank you for choosing to travel with us. We are currently flying over a large body of water. Please be advised that we are expecting turbulence due to the presence of dragons and wizards. We hope you enjoy your flight!&r
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest4138509809: When you need early power in the &4Nether&r, you can use &6lava&r as a replacement for water.
Getting power in the &4Nether&7 is important for infinite &6Lava&7!
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest4197728243: The fluid system in &3Create&r is fairly simple to understand.
To begin transporting fluids, you need to gather a lot of copper and make a &eMechanical Press&r.
Similar to &eAndesite Casing&r, &6Copper Casing&r can be made by using a copper ingot on a stripped log.
All You Need For Pumping Fluids
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest4259513261: They produce the same amount of &eSU&r as a &eWater Wheel&r...
Our Lawyers Will be in Contact Soon...
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest4331964605: &aGluing&r blocks together combines them. When these blocks are moved on a &dcontraption&r they will stick together.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest4600631376: &ePrecision Mechanisms&r are important components in many crafting recipes.
Crafting a &ePrecision Mechanism&r is a multistage process which has a &c20%%&r chance of failure. You need to do the process a total of 5 times.
&6Note:&r &eDeployers&r must be used in their crafting.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest4658495913: The &eMechanical Press&r is used in a variety of ways.
Pressing some ingots on a &eDepot&r will turn the items into their sheet form.
Compacting allows the automation of recipes where you compact an item (ie, Iron Blocks) by pressing the items in a &eBasin&r.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest4679663366: A single &eWindmill Bearing&r needs 128 &eWindmills&r to maximize the amount of &eSU&r it can produce!
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest4758675310: Placing a &eStock Link&f on a &ePackager&f will create your &dLogistics Network&f.
&eTip:&f Packages must be transported, but can be requested from anywhere.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest4794266130: Applying &6lava&r to &5Obsidian Dust&r and &dpressing&r it twice will create &eSturdy Sheets&r.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest4864311893: The &6Oven&r bakes food passed through it, provided an &eOven Fan&r is attached.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest4906439606: Some of the earliest &dContraptions&r you can make involve the &eCart Assembler&r.
Attaching &eDrills&r, &eHarvesters&r, or &eSaws&r will allow mobile usage of the blocks.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest4952294348: &eMobs&f and &eBlaze Burners&f use the &eStock Ticker&f when seated nearby to order stock from a warehouse. This turns the mobs into a &dShop Keeper&r.
&eTable Cloth&f can sell this stock after linking it with a &dShop Keeper&r.
&6Note:&f Only players can buy from this shop.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest5128171589: Similar to other casings, the &eBrass Casing&r can be made by applying a &eBrass Ingot&r onto stripped logs.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest5157413544: The &eEncased Fan&r is an important block that allows conversion of materials through various means.
Water: This functions as a &6washer&r allowing conversion of some materials (Sand -> Clay).
Lava: This functions as a &6smelter&r allowing infinite smelting for free.
Campfire: This functions as a &6cooker&r allowing the cooking of food items.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest5272674208: Master Desserts with this simple trick!
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest5296527382: Everything you will need all in one place!
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest5392456249: &3Soul Fire&7 in front of an &eEncased Fan&7 can haunt a variety of blocks into their &cNether&7 counterparts.
&7Haunting &eSand&7 will turn it into &eSoul Sand&7 which can be washed into &fQuartz.
Time to Haunt your own Factory
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest5569429250: Make sure to refuel your &eBacktank&r with rotational power!
&eTip:&r Wearing a full set of &eNetherite Diving Equipment&r and &eNetherite Leggings&r makes you immune to &6lava&r and helps you see clearly under the &6lava&r!
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest5624486851: Using the &dSchematic Table&r, you can load a saved &bSchematic's&r data onto a Schematic.

When a &bSchematic&r is placed down, it shows a holographic outline of the blocks of the build. Using a &eDeployer&r or &dSchematicannon&r will automatically fill the provided &bSchematic&r provided they have the blocks.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest5681684572: &eMechanical Harvesters&r will harvest crops placed in their path. When placed on a &dContraption&r, automated crop farms are a possibility.
&aSpreaders&r accelerate crop growth when placed in front of them and supplied by &eSU&r. The area affected can be increased by a &eNozzle&r placed in front.
&eStorage Interfaces&r connect the inventory of a &dContraption&r to your storage system!
One Needs to Eat to Think
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest5710951661: A &eWater Wheel&f is your first form of power in Create.
By placing flowing water, the &eWater Wheel&f will spin creating &eSU.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest6032087594: &dBoilers&r are essential to large-scale factories. They produce large amounts of &eSU&r by  feeding &eBlaze Burners&r burnable items or &6lava&r.

To create your first &dBoiler&r, you need a &eFluid Tank&r with water being pumped into it. Then, heat the tank with powered &eBlaze Burners&r. Finally, place &eSteam Engines&r and attach shafts to transform the &eFluid Tank&r into a &dBoiler&r.
&eSU&r generated by the &eSteam Engine&r is capped by the &dBoiler's&r level. Increasing the size and heat of the Boiler will generate more &eSU&r.
&6Note:&r This simple design will produce over 65,000 &eSU&r!
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest6072116664: &eFluid Pipes&r transport fluid through your fluid system, but only one liquid can pass through a &eFluid Pipe&r at a time.
Open-ended &eFluid Pipes&r will leak the liquid that travels through them.
&eMechanical Pumps&r are used to pump liquids through &eFluid Pipes&r.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest6455623962: Placing a &eTrain Station&r on a &eTrain Track&r allows for construction of customized &dTrains&r. &aSuper Gluing&r components will move them along with the &dTrain&r.
&eTip:&r &dTrains&r travel faster when they have fuel on board.
&6Note:&r &eTrains&r can travel through the &cNether&r allowing for transportation of liquids or Entities.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest6517502415: &ePackagers&r will package the contents of a container when a &cRedstone Signal&r is applied.
Craft a &ePackager&7 and Package Your First Item
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest6679639155: Throw some &5Obsidian&f into a &eCrusher&f to make &eObsidian Dust.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest6761112659: Holding &dRose Quartz&f in one hand and &eSandpaper&f in the other while holding &dright-click&f will polish the &dRose Quartz&f.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest7023417679: Placing a &eLarge Cog&r on a &6Rotational Controller&r allows manual input for your desired speed.
Power can be fed into both the &eLarge Cog&r or the base of the &6Rotational Controller&r.
The &oActual&r Best Way to Increase Speed
Rotation in the Palm of Your Hands
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest7068130622: The &eHose Pulley&r can extract liquids from large bodies of water.
&eTip:&r If a single source contains 10,000 blocks or more of a liquid, it becomes infinite when extracting with the &eHose Pulley&r.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest7385763833: The &eShotgun&r is an excellent weapon deep into &6Expert Mode&r.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest7455475687: &6Brass&r can be made by mixing copper and zinc in a heated &eBasin&r.
&eTip:&r Brass can also be cast in a &dCasting Table&r for the same resources!
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest7532812718: Superheating &eBlaze Burners&r with &6Blaze Cakes&r generates higher amounts of heat needed to maximize a &dSteam Engine&r.
You'll need &e72 Fluid Tanks&r arranged in a 3 x 3 x 8 pattern. Water then needs to be pumped into the tank while the &eBlaze Burners&r need to be fed &6Blaze Cakes&r.
More Power Than You'll Likely Need
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest7548388559: &eMechanical Crafters&r allow for automated crafting and advanced crafting.
Items in a &eCrafter&r flow in a direction. Every &eCrafter&r must reach a single point where they output the crafted item.
&cRedstone Power&r and &dRotational Force&r must be supplied to the &eCrafter&r to begin crafting.
Craft a &eMechanical Crafter&7 to Automate Crafting
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest7828896802: &eDeployers&r are an important tool for automation. They function as an alternative for &dplayer interactions&r.
&eDeployers&r can place blocks, kill mobs, break blocks, and make sequenced recipes!
&eTip:&r &eDeployers&r can hold any item and use them the way a player would.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest7853937403: The &eBrass Revolver&r can be used as an efficient weapon!
Even more, this weapon is very customisable and can be upgraded by pressing Z!
After applying all of the available upgrade, your revolver will become &o*very*&r powerful!
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest8391695215: The &eMechanical Mixer&r uses a basin to mix a variety of recipes.
The &eMechanical Mixer&r can brew potions, craft shapeless recipes, or create new alloys.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest8495988260: Mixing &eAndesite&r and &eZinc Nuggets&r or &eIron Nuggets&r will also produce &eAndesite Alloys&r.
This halves the cost for the essential component.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest9120586584: An alternative to water is &dWind Powered Contraptions&r. When attached to a &eWindmill Bearing&r and made into a contraption they will produce &eSU&r.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest9816954970: &eBlaze Cakes&r can be fed to a &eBlaze Burner&r to &dSuperheat&r it.
To make a &eBlaze Cake&r, use a spout to apply &6Lava&r on a &eBlaze Cake Base&r.
&eTip:&r &eBlaze Cakes&r also make great ammunition for the &ePotato Cannon&r.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest9852540743: It has improved speed, takeoff and strength compared to the classic Biplane!
ftbquests.chapter.create.title: &7Create
